windows.command: $codeCli = Join-Path (Split-Path '${execPath}') 'bin\code.cmd'; if (Test-Path '${workspaceFolder}\extensions.txt') { Get-Content '${workspaceFolder}\extensions.txt' | ForEach-Object { & $codeCli --install-extension $_ } } else { Write-Error 'extensions.txt not found in workspace root.' }

linux.command: code_cli="$(dirname '${execPath}')/bin/code"; if [ -f '${workspaceFolder}/extensions.txt' ]; then while IFS= read -r ext; do "$code_cli" --install-extension "$ext"; done < '${workspaceFolder}/extensions.txt'; else echo 'extensions.txt not found in workspace root.'; exit 1; fi
